prerequisites: Xero account with API access enabled

steps.title: Enable Xero API access
steps.description: Go to Xero Developer portal and create an app

steps.title: Install Shopify connector
steps.description: From Shopify App Store, install the Xero integration app

verificationSteps: Create a test order in Shopify
Check it appears in Xero within 5 minutes

commonPitfalls.issue: Tax codes don't match between platforms
commonPitfalls.prevention: Map Shopify tax settings to Xero tax rates before enabling sync

nextStepSuggestion: Set up webhooks for real-time sync.
nextStepDescription: Use Webhook Builder to set up real-time notifications between your platforms.
